tasks.title: Diagnose monthly sick leave report email delivery in n8n
tasks.proof: Diagnosed ILTT Sick Leave workflow YzVRsdXdCC7EJ64U. Manager email resolves to jsambre@gmail.com. Recent execution 14706 marked success but contained hidden node errors: [Monthly] 6 Generate Excel failed with 'Module xlsx is disallowed [line 2]' and [Monthly] 7 Email Report to Manager failed with 'The value in the JSON Body field is not valid JSON'. Email node has continueOnFail=true, so workflow stays green despite failure.

tasks.title: Fix monthly sick leave report to send as PDF
tasks.proof: Updated workflow YzVRsdXdCC7EJ64U to generate PDF instead of Excel, fixed email node payload, disabled silent continueOnFail on email, hardened report data lookup against missing manager-branch execution, reactivated workflow, locally validated PDF generation to /tmp/iltt-sick-leave-report-test.pdf, and manually emailed a PDF copy to jsambre@gmail.com.

tasks.title: Investigate current n8n error
tasks.proof: Inspected latest n8n error. Execution 14707 for workflow YzVRsdXdCC7EJ64U failed at [Monthly] 7. Root cause upstream: [Monthly] 5 Build Report Data still throws 'Node [Monthly] 4. Get Manager (Airtable) hasn't been executed', which causes [Monthly] 6 Generate PDF to fail with missing period.month_name, then email node errors. Also observed separate n8n app log warnings about X-Forwarded-For with trust proxy false.

tasks.title: Fix ILTT monthly report workflow and n8n proxy config
tasks.proof: Patched workflow YzVRsdXdCC7EJ64U so [Monthly] 5 catches missing manager-branch execution, normalizes Airtable array fields, and preserves PDF/email flow; recreated n8n container with N8N_PROXY_HOPS=1 plus existing env; validated n8n responds at https://n8n-andy.xyz and the previous X-Forwarded-For trust-proxy ValidationError no longer appears in logs after a live request.

tasks.title: Investigate repeated n8n sick leave error
tasks.proof: Investigated execution 14708. Build Report Data and Generate PDF now succeed. Current manual failure is narrowed to [Monthly] 7 Email Report to Manager, where n8n reported invalid expression syntax in the JSON body. Patched the email node syntax and updated workflow. Also confirmed webhook path evolution-whatsapp still exists in workflow export, but n8n startup continues not to list ILTT among activated workflows, causing unknown-webhook errors; published version pointer now matches current version.

tasks.title: Fix ILTT webhook registration and activation
tasks.proof: ILTT workflow now activates on n8n startup and webhook path evolution-whatsapp registers correctly. Removed self-referencing error workflow, repaired publish/activation state, republished workflow, and verified activation in n8n logs.

tasks.title: Inspect latest ILTT failure after webhook and email fixes
tasks.proof: Inspected latest execution 14710. Root cause was real Resend 422 invalid_attachment: n8n built attachments with filename only because binary content was dropped at email node. Patched [Monthly] 6 Generate PDF to place attachment base64 directly into email_payload.attachments and simplified [Monthly] 7 Email Report to Manager to send {{.email_payload}} verbatim. Workflow updated, republished, and n8n restarted.

tasks.title: Investigate stale manager email in ILTT report
tasks.proof: Investigated stale manager email issue. Root cause: [Monthly] 5 Build Report Data still contained hardcoded fallback manager email jsambre@gmail.com, and latest execution used that fallback despite Airtable now showing ernie@princess-promenade.com. Patched workflow to remove fallback entirely and fetch active Manager record directly from Airtable at runtime, failing loudly if Email is missing. Workflow updated, republished, and n8n restarted.

tasks.title: Fix Obsidian Templater file placement

Verified template contents on server, then emailed Meeting Note Templater.md to jsambre@gmail.com with placement instructions for local vault Templates/ and 05 Meetings/.
